title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at S.Chand Group Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at S.Chand Group Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at S.Chand Group Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About S.Chand Group Capital India:
S.Chand Group Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with S.Chand Group Capital India!
